title: black pearl
description: A dark, almost black Ender Pearl with subtle shades of gray and white highlights for detail. The texture remains pixelated and flat, just like in Minecraft, with a slight shine that gives it a mysterious and powerful feel without any 3D effect.
body:
Upgrade your game with a clean Black Ender Pearl texture.
This mod replaces the default Ender Pearl with a sleek all-black design featuring a minimal and modern aesthetic. Perfect for PvP, crystal fights, or players who love a clean-looking texture pack.

✔ Smooth black texture
✔ Clean & minimal design
✔ Perfect for PvP and dark-themed packs
✔ Lightweight and simple
